text.title: Requirements Prioritization Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the requirements-prioritization methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Q2 backlog → method locked MoSCoW → group weights reconciled → distribution check (Must 55%/Should 25%/Could 15%/Won't 5%) → PR-0011 published with per-item rationale.
